last_prompt: Perform end-to-end integration evaluation of all new features working together. Create a small test scenario with a mix of ideas, implementer, and evaluator tasks that exercise: role-based routing, dynamic task generation, agent memory persistence, and intelligent scheduling. Verify the complete workflow runs without errors in headless mode. Run the full test suite with 'cargo test --verbose'. Update docs/architecture.md to reflect the new agent swarm capabilities. Mark this task complete only if all systems work together correctly.
